calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Michael Rossoff, Esq., for Plaintiff Neveo Mosser.
Defendant Melvin Starks present in pro per.
10:15 am. - Parties settled and agreed to a written Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal with prejudice.
Defendant agreed to pays the sum of $500.00 by the end of the day.
Balance and attorney's fees by 10 monthly installment plus any regular rent, case to be dismissed when paid in full. Parties agreed to terms, written stipulation not filed.
Matter is vacated from trial calendar.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day in Dept 218 with Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: V.Mack, Reporter: Patricia Van Steenberge CSR #1742
Appearances:
Michael Rossoff, Esq., for plaintiff Neveo Mosser.
Melvin Starks, Defendant in pro per.
Parties met in Dept 504A with Judge Pro Tem Paul Arshawsky but did not reach a settlement agreement at this conference. If parties cannot settle by JAN. 2, 2004, both sides will appear on JAN. 5, 2004 for trial.
